data.title: DAV Launches Digital Resource on Psychedelic Therapy for Veterans
data.description: In Erlanger, Kentucky, on April 16, 2026, DAV (Disabled American Veterans) introduced a new online platform aimed at informing veterans, caregivers, and the general public about psychedelic-assisted treatments for mental health issues linked to their military service. This initiative comes as an increasing amount of veterans are turning to these therapies for support and healing.

data.title: Quickplay Deploys Gray Media's New Streaming Platform -- Powered by Google Cloud AI -- Across 113 Markets, Redefining the Future of Local Media Delivery
data.description: Developed in collaboration with Quickplay and powered by Google Cloud, a new platform has been implemented to merge 1,300 digital touchpoints into a cohesive cloud-native infrastructure. This advancement enables the provision of tailored news and entertainment content to approximately 37% of television households in the United States. The launch took place at the NAB Show in Las Vegas on April 16, 2026.

data.title: PointClickCare and AIDA Healthcare Partner to Revolutionize Referral Management, Streamline Patient Care Transitions, and Reduce Costs Nationwide
data.description: A partnership has been established with the goal of decreasing administrative workload, simplifying referrals, and speeding up patient transfers from acute to post-acute care facilities. The collaboration involves PointClickCare, a prominent health technology firm specializing in enhancing care delivery. This collaboration is set to enhance efficiency in the healthcare system by improving processes between acute and post-acute care settings. This initiative is expected to positively impact numerous patients and healthcare professionals by optimizing operations and enhancing overall patient care.

data.title: Caterpillar Inc. to Announce First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30
data.description: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT), based in Irving, Texas, has announced that they will be sharing their first-quarter financial results on Thursday, April 30th at 5:30 a.m. CDT. The complete release will be accessible at investors.caterpillar.com/financials/quarterly-results as well as through PR Newswire.

data.title: CUMBERLAND PHARMACEUTICALS ANNOUNCES EXPANDED INDICATION FOR CALDOLOR® (IBUPROFEN) INJECTION  AND LAUNCH OF NEW BRAND WEBSITE
data.description: Cumberland Pharmaceuticals Inc., a specialty pharmaceutical company based in Nashville, Tennessee, has recently been granted approval by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for a new non-opioid pain management solution. This alternative treatment method is deemed safe and effective for patients. The approval was issued on April 16, 2026. Cumberland Pharmaceuticals Inc. is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CPIX.

data.title: NCCN Awards Grants to Improve Lung Cancer Screening Rates According to Guideline Recommendations
data.description: The Oncology Research Program of the National Comprehensive Cancer Network has approved funding for four quality improvement research projects aimed at boosting the uptake of lung cancer screening to enhance patient care. This initiative was announced in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Full Circle Lithium Inc. Showcasing FCL-X™ at the Fire Department Instructors Conference (FDIC International)
data.description: Breakthrough technology for extinguishing lithium battery fires has been successfully demonstrated during a major logistics and airline lithium battery burn demo. The technology, developed by Full Circle Lithium Corp. (FCL), has gained the trust of U.S. first responders for lithium thermal runaway fire safety. The demonstration took place in Toronto on April 16, 2026. This new technology is expected to revolutionize lithium battery fire safety measures and protect against potential disasters.

data.title: Pura Beverage Company Brings PuraSoda to U.S. Shoppers With Nationwide Sprouts Launch
data.description: Cape Town-based company, Pura Beverage Company, has introduced its clean-label, low-sugar sodas to the U.S. market. The brand's PuraSoda line offers a healthier alternative to traditional sodas, made with simple ingredients. The launch took place in April 2026, marking the company's expansion into American shelves. PuraSoda aims to provide consumers with a better-for-you option, containing lower sugar content compared to regular sodas. This move signifies the company's commitment to offering healthier beverage choices to customers.

data.title: The 'One-Person Unicorn' Era is Here - MasterClass Debuts a New Class to Help Members Work Smarter
data.description: Discover how to increase productivity by automating processes, creating AI assistants, and integrating common tools for quicker and more effective tasks. On April 16, 2026, in San Francisco, MasterClass revealed insights on leveraging technology to enhance work performance. This platform, renowned for enabling individuals to reach their full potential with top-notch instruction, introduced a new program focusing on these tactics for optimization.

data.title: Seal Security Launches Mythos Readiness Program to Close the "Silent Patch Gap" Between Fix Commits and CVE Advisories
data.description: A recent study reveals that 94% of patches for Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) are made public prior to any advisory being released. This creates a vulnerability window of around 11 days, during which cyber attackers can exploit the bug swiftly with the help of advanced AI agents. To combat this issue, a program is being launched to provide 50 companies, not affiliated with Anthropic's Glasswing partnership, with the necessary tools and support for implementing security patches effectively.

data.title: Workday and Achievers Launch AI‑Powered Recognition and Rewards Solution to Boost Employee Engagement and Retention
data.description: Pleasanton-based Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) and Toronto-based Achievers have joined forces to offer Workday Recognition provided by Achievers to customers. Achievers, known for being the most widely used recognition and reward software globally, has integrated its solution into the Workday experience. The collaboration leverages AI to help HR leaders gain insights into performance drivers. This enhancement is geared towards optimizing people, financial resources, and operations.

data.title: Rithum Introduces SupplyExplorer, Helping Retailers Discover and Connect with High-Value Suppliers Faster
data.description: In Dallas, Rithum has debuted SupplyExplorer, a platform that leverages artificial intelligence and network data to assist retailers in swiftly identifying and engaging with valuable suppliers.

data.title: Chemelex Makes Minority Investment in Algo8 to Advance AI-Driven Manufacturing
data.description: Chemelex, a prominent player in electric thermal and sensing solutions, has disclosed its minority investment in Algo8, an industrial AI firm. This move aims to boost the integration of AI in manufacturing. The investment will bolster the advancement of Algo8’s technology, empowering Chemelex to refine its manufacturing operations, enhance productivity, and maintain superior product standards for its customers. Chemelex's decision signifies a strategic effort to stay at the forefront of technological innovation in the industry.

data.title: TurbineOne Awarded Army Contract Through Joint Innovation Outpost
data.description: TurbineOne has recently secured a contract from the U.S. Army through the Joint AI Center's Joint Innovation OPortunity Program (JIOP). The contract is aimed at implementing an edge AI platform for instant threat identification in hostile environments. This cutting-edge technology will be crucial for enhancing real-time security measures.

data.title: 6sense Appoints Ashley Jefferson as Chief People Officer and Promotes Julia Lake to Chief Information Security Officer
data.description: In San Francisco, the Revenue Intelligence platform, 6sense®, has named Ashley Jefferson as Chief People Officer and promoted Julia Lake to Chief Information Security Officer. With the B2B go-to-market technology market becoming increasingly competitive and AI influencing revenue teams, 6sense is strengthening its leadership team to uphold its leading position in the category and ensure sustained growth. This move comes as part of the company's strategy to adapt to the evolving industry landscape.

data.title: Wayne County Bank Selects Apiture Digital Banking to Power Its Next Phase of Growth
data.description: In Paducah, Kentucky, Apiture, a prominent digital banking solutions provider under CSI, revealed its partnership with Wayne County Bank. The bank, with assets totaling $560 million and operating out of Waynesboro, Tennessee, offers services through eight branches spanning three counties. Amid substantial expansion, Wayne County Bank opted for the Apiture Digital Banking Platform to enhance its digital banking services for customers, aiming to provide a contemporary and user-friendly experience.

data.title: Onto Innovation’s Dragonfly® G5 System Qualified for Applications in 2.5D AI Packaging
data.description: Wilmington, Massachusetts - Onto Innovation Inc. (NYSE: ONTO) revealed the qualification completion of the Dragonfly® G5 platform for 2.5D advanced packaging applications. This successful qualification allows for the system's use in both new and existing applications. The Dragonfly G5 platform boasts new proprietary optics, illumination, and advanced algorithms that boost visibility and throughput. Initial shipments of this system are anticipated to commence in June. The advanced features of the Dragonfly G5 are set to significantly enhance operational efficiency and productivity in the field of advanced packaging.

data.title: Wisp and Visby Medical Partner to Provide Care with the First FDA-Authorized At-Home PCR STI Test
data.description: In New York, Wisp, the biggest women's telehealth company in the US, has revealed a collaboration with Visby Medical, a top provider of rapid at-home PCR diagnostics. This partnership aims to raise awareness during STI Awareness Week by enhancing availability of Visby's FDA-approved at-home PCR STI test. Wisp will offer telehealth services for patients who test positive for chlamydia, gonorrhea, or trichomoniasis. The World Health Organization supports this initiative.

data.title: Cirrus Logic Introduces New Industrial Imaging Products for High-Precision Scan Applications
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Cirrus Logic (NASDAQ: CRUS) introduced a new series of industrial imaging integrated circuits (ICs) tailored for high-accuracy scanning systems. This move broadens Cirrus Logic’s industrial product lineup and offers a top-notch, all-in-one analog front-end solution for multi-functional printers, scanners, and cutting-edge industrial imaging platforms. The ICs are optimized for various uses, spanning from personal and professional scanners to industrial flatbed systems.

data.title: Twilio Flex Now Available as an Embeddable Contact Center
data.description: In San Francisco, Twilio (NYSE: TWLO) unveiled a new Flex SDK for companies to seamlessly incorporate contact center functionalities into their current applications, such as voice capabilities for Agentforce Service. This release introduces improved insights and a versatile User + Usage pricing model, applicable for Flex deployments within an existing Twilio account.
